name: backend
description: Backend engineering standards and workflows for DDD, API design, and data modeling

# Backend

## Overview

Use this skill when implementing or reviewing backend features.

## What it adds

- Backend standards for DDD, SOLID, API design, and error handling.
- Agents: `backend-developer`, `db-reviewer`.
- Prompts: `plan-backend-task`, `develop-backend`, `develop-backend-data-modeling`.

## When to use

- New or existing backend services and APIs.
- Tasks that change domain logic, contracts, persistence, or migrations.

## Related prompts and agents

- Start with `plan-backend-task` for feature-sized work.
- Implement with `develop-backend`.
- Use `develop-backend-data-modeling` for schema and ORM changes.
